testkitchen-desc: Waxay bixisaa PHP iyo JS Test Kitchen SDKs, kuwaas oo horumariyeyaashu u adeegsadaan hirgelinta tijaabooyin iyo ururinta xogta falanqaynta.
testkitchen-non-successful-response: API-ga Test Kitchen wuxuu soo celiyay jawaab aan guul ahayn.
testkitchen-api-empty-response-body: API-ga Test Kitchen wuxuu soo celiyay jawaab aan lahayn wax nuxur ah.
